title: Stormilla Dark Mode
body:
![GUIs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PTB4Km9g/images/d2f3afde761e0516176d68549603824c8c749c87.png) This pack changes all GUI to be darker. The reason there's a lighter box in the shulker box interface is because you can't change the color of text for renamed shulker boxes and the gray text is barely readable against this background. This pack was created for [Stormilla](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stormilla) but will still work on it's own. Currently only supports English including all (non-joke) regional variants. --- ### Some features require OptiFine or Fabric/Quilt equivalents, pack still works without it however.
Pack utilizes: Custom Loading Screen Background --- © 2021 StormDragon77 | Some Rights Reserved | CC BY-NC-SA
